llm_advice.rationale: Baseline uses multiple ATen GEMM launches for rank-16 path. Fusing B.T @ X and A @ result into a single kernel that adds to Y reduces launch overhead and memory traffic. Keep cuBLAS for large W @ X GEMM. Start with scalar kernel for simplicity, then vectorize, then tile for better reuse.

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
